title: Implement penetration logic (entity/block penetration counting + dedup sets)

reference_files.reason: Penetration logic - entity_penetration count, block_penetration count, penetrated entity Set<UUID> + block Set<BlockPos> dedup, bullet continues after penetration, removed when count exhausted
RemoveReason enum - HIT_ENTITY (penetration exhausted), HIT_BLOCK (penetration exhausted)

acceptance_criteria: PenetrationHandler class created to process penetration after collision hit
BulletRecord (or companion class) extended with Set<UUID> penetratedEntities and Set<BlockPos> penetratedBlocks dedup sets

Entity hit handling: if entity_penetration > 0, decrement count, add entity UUID to penetratedEntities set, bullet continues flying; if entity_penetration == 0, bullet removed with RemoveReason.HIT_ENTITY
Block hit handling: if block_penetration > 0, decrement count, add BlockPos to penetratedBlocks set, bullet continues flying; if block_penetration == 0, bullet removed with RemoveReason.HIT_BLOCK
Dedup: collision detection (subtask 10) skips entities in penetratedEntities set and blocks in penetratedBlocks set
entity_penetration and block_penetration values read from BulletSnapshot stats at hit time
Sets are per-bullet lifetime, released when bullet removed
Different bullets hitting same entity each judge independently (no cross-bullet shared sets)
handleEntityHit(BulletRecord, Entity, BulletSnapshot) and handleBlockHit(BulletRecord, BlockPos, BulletSnapshot) methods, each under 50 lines
